title: Create Cobblestone Mixers
description: Adds a block-breaking free way of generating cobblestone for all your Create Mod needs...
body:
![The mod title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7411e61c23bbae5c46402f424adc07a03f98879b.png)**Cobblestone Mixers** is a small mod for **optimising Create Mod farms** and generators. There is just one recipe:
